meta.title: Partner Portal
meta.description: TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems partner portal — apply for strategic partnerships, track development initiatives, and access capability documents.

dashboard.title: Partner Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your partnership inquiry, development initiatives, and next actions within the TVK ecosystem.

partnershipStatus.title: Strategic Partnership Pipeline
partnershipStatus.description: TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems is in a research, development, and partnership-building stage. Submit an application to begin a structured collaboration conversation.

nextSteps.title: Recommended Next Steps
items: Submit a strategic partnership application with your organization details
Review capability areas across energy systems and infrastructure technologies
Explore active development initiatives in the projects section
Contact our partnerships team for pilot or collaboration opportunities

apply.title: Partnership Application
apply.subtitle: Apply for strategic collaboration with TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems.
apply.intro: Complete this form to introduce your organization and describe your partnership interest. Our team reviews all applications and responds to qualified inquiries.
apply.disclaimer: This application does not constitute a binding agreement. TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems LTD is in a development stage — information describes capability areas, not operational commitments.

success.title: Application Received
success.message: Thank you for your partnership interest. Our team will review your application and respond within 5–10 business days.

placeholders.name: Your full name
placeholders.allocation: e.g. Pilot project, $500K collaboration, technology integration
placeholders.message: Describe your organization, strategic fit, and proposed collaboration...

projects.title: Development Initiatives
projects.subtitle: Current capability areas and development-stage initiatives within the TVK ecosystem.

items.title: Energy Systems Integration
items.description: Renewable integration, industrial energy solutions, and intelligent energy management frameworks.

items.title: Smart Infrastructure Technologies
items.description: Digital infrastructure systems, monitoring platforms, and critical infrastructure technology development.

items.title: Industrial AI & Analytics
items.description: Industrial AI, infrastructure analytics, and intelligent automation research for complex operational environments.

documents.title: Capability Documents
documents.subtitle: Official capability briefs and reference materials from the corporate website.

items.title: Energy Systems Capabilities
items.description: Overview of energy systems development, renewable integration, and energy intelligence.

items.title: Infrastructure Technologies
items.description: Smart infrastructure, digital systems, and critical infrastructure technology development.

items.title: Strategic Partnerships
items.description: Partnership models, collaboration frameworks, and engagement process.

items.title: Insights & Research
items.description: Industry perspectives on energy, infrastructure, and industrial technology.

support.title: Partner Support
support.subtitle: Contact the TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems team for partnership, technical, and general inquiries.
support.disclaimer: For urgent operational matters, contact your assigned partnership representative. Response times: 1–2 business days for general inquiries.

channels.title: Partnership Inquiries
channels.description: Strategic collaboration, pilot opportunities, and long-term partnership development.

channels.title: Investor Relations
channels.description: Capital formation and strategic investment discussions within the TVK ecosystem.

channels.title: Technical Support
channels.description: Portal access, application status, and technical questions.

channels.title: General Contact
channels.description: General inquiries about TVK Infrastructure & Energy Systems.

install.title: Get the TVK Partner Portal app
install.subtitle: Install the partnership portal on your phone — apply, track initiatives, and access capability documents from a home-screen icon. Works today via Add to Home Screen; App Store listing planned for Phase 2.

iphone.title: iPhone / iPad
iphone.steps: Safari → Open Partner Portal → Share → Add to Home Screen

android.title: Android
android.steps: Chrome → Open Partner Portal → menu → Install app or Add to Home screen

desktop.title: Desktop
desktop.steps: Chrome or Edge → install icon in the address bar, or bookmark the Partner Portal
